expected_records.title: Find A Friend
expected_records.location: Throughout Disney’s Port Orleans Resort - French Quarter
expected_records.description: Search the Resort for a hidden Louis photo prop. Once located, snap a photo and then head to the Concierge Desk to receive a surprise!

description.text: Search the Resort for a hidden Louis photo prop.
Once located, snap a photo and then head to the
Concierge Desk to receive a surprise!

expected_records.title: South Quarter Games Arcade
expected_records.description: Play the latest and greatest family-friendly video games.

expected_records.title: Poolside Activities
expected_records.schedule_text: Sunday, Monday, Tuesday, Thursday, Friday and Saturday from 12:30pm-2:00pm
expected_records.description: Soak in the sun with some family-friendly activities, both in and out of the water. See a Recreation Cast Member for more information.

schedule.text: Sunday, Monday, Tuesday, Thursday, Friday and Saturday

expected_records.title: Painting On De’ Bayou
expected_records.description: Get in touch with your inner artist in this unique 2-hour instructor-led painting class! This experience is recommended for ages 12 and up. Space is limited. To book, visit or call the Riverside Levee Marina at 407-934-5507.

description.text: Get in touch with your inner artist in this unique
2-hour instructor-led painting class! This experience is
recommended for ages 12 and up. Space is limited. To book,
visit or call the Riverside Levee Marina at 407-934-5507.

expected_records.title: Mickey Tie-Dye
expected_records.description: Get creative with a Disney twist on this arts and crafts favorite!

description.text: Get creative with a Disney twist on this arts and
crafts favorite!

expected_records.title: Mosaic Class
expected_records.description: Immerse yourself in a famous art tradition as you design your own mosaic showpiece with a touch of Disney flair. This experience is recommended for Guests ages 12 and up. Class may take up to 2 hours. Space is limited. To book, visit or call the Riverside Levee Marina at 407-934-5507.

expected_records.title: Cajun Campfire
expected_records.description: Enjoy the warm glow of the campfire with complimentary marshmallows. S’mores kits available for purchase.
